5.display: No. 1 is not prime because a prime has exactly two factors; 1 only has one factor.

6.display: Always — the LCM is always one of the two numbers (e.g. LCM of 4 and 6 is 12, which is neither; sometimes neither — LCM of 6 and 9 is 18). Actually: Sometimes — e.g. LCM(3,6)=6 which is one of the numbers; LCM(4,6)=12 which is neither.

7.display: 24 packs; 2 bottles and 3 bars in each pack
